entries.title: devlog now fetches tags before it looks for releases (0.3.1)
entries.summary: Fixes a discovery bug where /devlog missed a release that was already live, because it read only local git tags and never fetched. Also rides the new shared release CI.

entries.title: Reworked devlog to log releases, written in my own voice (0.3.0)
entries.summary: devlog 0.3.0 switches from a daily commit log to one entry per version release, and writes each entry from a configurable voice profile so the log sounds like me.

entries.title: Taught devlog to track per-skill feeds inside a monorepo (0.2.0)
entries.summary: Added an optional pathFilter to the devlog skill so several projects can share one monorepo repo/path while each tracks only its own subdirectory — the change that lets three consolidated skills keep separate dev-log feeds.

entries.title: Accessibility pass on the dev-log component, shipped as 0.1.9
entries.summary: Made the drop-in React dev-log feed fully keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible with proper disclosure semantics on the expand/collapse, and released it as 0.1.9.

entries.title: Shipped @natjswenson/devlog on npm — the personal dev-log skill, now shareable
entries.summary: Took the personal /devlog Claude Code skill, genericized it, wrapped it in an npx CLI, and shipped it to npm so the folks who pinged on LinkedIn can install it with one command.
